sources.quote: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is a medical imaging procedure that uses a large magnet, radio waves, and a computer to make detailed pictures of the inside of your body.
Diagnostic imaging lets doctors look inside your body for clues about a medical condition.

factsExtracted.value: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is a medical imaging procedure that uses a large magnet, radio waves, and a computer to make detailed pictures of the inside of your body.
